race.description: Maclean Hotel Country Boosted Belflyer Prelude Hcp (C3)
race.comment: SOMERTON SMART (6) returns after a ten-week lay-off. Beaten just over a length over this distance at Scone when fresh from a spell last prep. Lightly raced three-year-old with plenty of scope for improvement this time in work. THEIR FINEST HOUR (5) has won two from two this campaign by an aggregate of 10 lengths. Both were on heavy tracks so it remains to be seen if the form carries to a firmer surface. SIRSA NUWA (12) dominated up front at Port Macquarie last start and should give a great sight again. BARELLO (7) is resuming from a lay-off. Opened last campaign with a fifth at Ballina over 1015m. In the mix.
